clusters.justification: Reflects the broad processing of emotional significance, physiological arousal, and subjective feelings fundamentally linked to the salience and corticolimbic networks.
Represents the macro-level computation of stimulus utility, reward learning, and motivated decision-making canonical to fronto-striatal dopaminergic networks.
Captures the macroscopic domain of internally directed processing, integrating self-referential thought, interpersonal empathy, and social attribution mediated by the default mode network.
